title: VPN Access Request
text: To connect to the internal network from home, submit a VPN access request through the IT portal. Approval from your manager is required. Once approved, install the GlobalProtect client and sign in with your corporate credentials.

title: Working Remotely
text: Employees who work from home can reach company systems securely using the remote access gateway. Speak to your team lead to get permission, then set up the secure tunnel software on your laptop.

title: Password Reset
text: If you forget your login, visit the self-service portal and click Reset Password. You will receive a one-time code on your registered mobile number. Codes expire after 10 minutes.

title: Account Recovery
text: Locked out of your account? Use the account recovery flow to regain access. The system sends a verification code to your phone. Enter it within ten minutes before it becomes invalid.

title: Expense Reimbursement Policy
text: Submit expense claims within 30 days of purchase. Attach itemized receipts. Claims over INR 10000 need director sign-off. Reimbursements are processed in the next payroll cycle.

title: Getting Money Back for Purchases
text: When you spend your own funds for work, you can be paid back. File your claim within a month, include proof of payment, and large amounts require senior approval. Payment arrives with your salary.

title: Error Code E-4042
text: Error E-4042 means the licensing server could not be reached. Check your network connection and confirm the license service is running. If it persists, restart the application and contact support.

title: Annual Leave
text: Full-time staff accrue 1.75 days of paid time off each month. Unused leave up to 15 days carries over to the next year. Apply through the HR system at least one week in advance.

title: Vacation Time
text: Permanent employees earn holiday allowance monthly. You may roll over a limited number of unused days into the following year. Request time off ahead of schedule so your manager can plan coverage.

title: Onboarding Checklist
text: New joiners should collect their laptop, set up email, enroll in two-factor authentication, and complete the security training within the first week. Your buddy will guide you through each step.

title: Two-Factor Authentication Setup
text: Enable 2FA by installing an authenticator app and scanning the QR code in your security settings. Save the backup codes somewhere safe in case you lose your device.

title: Health Insurance Enrollment
text: Choose your medical coverage during the open enrollment window each November. Dependents can be added with proof of relationship. Coverage starts on the first day of the next month.

title: Parking Permit
text: Apply for an on-site parking permit through facilities. Spots are limited and assigned by seniority and distance from public transit. Permits are renewed annually.

title: Booking a Meeting Room
text: Reserve conference rooms via the calendar system. Select the room, choose your slot, and invite attendees. Release the room if your meeting is cancelled so others can use it.

title: Software Procurement
text: To buy new software, raise a purchase request with a business justification. Security reviews the tool before approval. Licenses are tracked centrally to avoid duplicate spend.

title: Reporting a Phishing Email
text: If you receive a suspicious message, do not click any links. Use the Report Phishing button in your mail client. The security team investigates and will alert you if action is needed.

title: Travel Booking
text: Book work trips through the approved travel agency. Economy fares are standard for flights under six hours. Hotels should fall within the per-city nightly cap. Keep all receipts for claims.

title: Performance Review Cycle
text: Reviews happen twice a year, in June and December. Complete your self-assessment, gather peer feedback, and meet your manager to discuss goals and growth areas.

title: Error Code E-1001
text: Error E-1001 indicates an authentication failure. Your session token has likely expired. Sign out fully and sign back in. If the issue continues, clear your browser cache.

title: Office WiFi
text: Connect to the CorpNet-Secure wireless network using your domain login. Guest visitors should use CorpNet-Guest, which requires a daily passcode from reception.
